# Supplementary Statistical Appendix — Drug X COPD Trial

## S1. Primary analysis
The primary outcome (change in FEV1 at 12 weeks) was analysed with a mixed model for repeated
measures, adjusting for baseline FEV1 and centre.

## S2. Sensitivity analyses
Per-protocol and complete-case analyses were consistent with the primary intention-to-treat
result.
